cursor_task.title: Phase 13 - Japanese Reading Assist Layer
cursor_task.context: NihonGo BJT serves learners at many Japanese levels. Users may not know how to read kanji or business vocabulary shown anywhere in the web app. Build a site-wide Japanese Reading Assist Layer so users can hover, click, or tap Japanese words to see reading, meaning, and learning actions. Read AGENTS.md, .cursor/rules/*.mdc, docs/spec/nihongo_bjt_cursor_master_spec_v14.md and docs/spec/nihongo_bjt_cursor_master_spec_v14_1_final.md before editing.
cursor_task.goal: Implement a production-grade vertical slice for Japanese reading assistance across the app: reusable annotated text components, analyzer endpoint, preference persistence, cache, word card UI, add-to-flashcard action, and basic admin reports.

must_follow.item: Do not implement hard-coded demo tooltips.
Do not use frontend-only fake dictionary data as source of truth.
Use existing dictionary/content tables where possible.
Use provider abstraction for tokenization and dictionary lookup.
Cache analyzed text by normalized text hash.
Support desktop hover/click and mobile tap/bottom-sheet behavior.
Respect exam mode: do not reveal answer-help during active timed BJT exam unless configured as practice mode or after answering.
Do not log full private user text into analytics.
Basic reading support must be available to free users; only advanced AI explanations or high-volume batch annotation may be quota-limited.

deliverables.item: Prisma models or SQL migrations for reading assist cache and user preferences.
Backend module: ReadingAssistModule with analyze endpoint and preference endpoints.
Frontend components: JapaneseText, AnnotatedJapaneseText, ReadingAssistTooltip, ReadingAssistBottomSheet, WordCardPopover, ReadingAssistPreferencePanel.
Analytics events for word card open, furigana toggle, add-to-flashcard, report incorrect meaning, and cache miss.
Admin reading assist report page for unknown terms, missing readings, failed tokenization, and reported meanings.
Tests for analyzer, cache, preferences, exam-mode guard, and add-to-flashcard integration.

quality_gate.item: Run lint, typecheck, tests, and Prisma validation.
Verify a sample phrase such as 念のため確認させてください。 displays reading assist correctly.
Verify mobile bottom sheet and desktop tooltip behavior.
Verify timed BJT exam mode does not reveal meaning before answer submission.
